description: Create diff utility functions in src/utils/diff.ts
context:
Beads description:
Create the core diffing utility functions extracted from the reference implementation.

## File: src/utils/diff.ts

## Functions to implement

### 1. hslToRgb(h: number, s: number, l: number): [number, number, number]
Converts HSL color to RGB for diff visualization.
Reference: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wesbos/diff/refs/heads/main/utils.ts

### 2. imageToCanvas(img: HTMLImageElement): HTMLCanvasElement
Converts an image element to a canvas for pixel access.
- Support optional scaleDownFactor for performance
- Handle naturalWidth/naturalHeight properly

### 3. getImageData(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement): ImageData
Extracts pixel data from a canvas.
Returns: { data: Uint8ClampedArray, width: number, height: number }

### 4. compareImages(img1Data: ImageData, img2Data: ImageData): DiffResult
The core comparison algorithm:
- Handles different sized images (use max dimensions)
- Weighted pixel diff: R*0.299 + G*0.587 + B*0.114 + A*0.1
- Ignores tiny diffs (<0.005) for anti-aliasing tolerance
- Generates diff canvas with HSL heatmap
- Returns { score: number, diffCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement }

### 5. captureElement(element: HTMLElement): Promise<HTMLImageElement>
Uses snapdom to capture a DOM element as an image.

### 6. loadImageAsCanvas(src: string): Promise<HTMLCanvasElement>
Loads an image URL and converts to canvas (for target images).

## Types to export
```ts
export interface ImageData {
  data: Uint8ClampedArray;
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

export interface DiffResult {
  score: number;
  diffCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement;
}

export interface DiffOptions {
  scaleDownFactor?: number;
  threshold?: number; // default 0.005
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- All functions exported and typed
- Unit testable (pure functions where possible)
- Matches reference algorithm behavior
